scenes.headline: **Adobe's Expanded AI Agents** Hit Creative Cloud
scenes.sub: Revolutionizing Workflows in Premiere, Illustrator, and More
scenes.vo: Welcome to the future of creativity! Adobe's Expanded AI Agents have landed on Creative Cloud, revolutionizing your workflow. Get ready to unlock unprecedented efficiency!

scenes.heading: Key Updates Across Adobe Suite
scenes.vo: Key updates are rolling out across the entire Adobe Suite, integrating AI deeper than ever before. From editing to design, the transformation is vast.

scenes.label: Adobe Apps with New AI Assistants
scenes.vo: Over 5 major Adobe applications now boast AI Agents, marking a significant milestone in Adobe's AI integration journey.

scenes.heading: Capabilities by App
bullets: **Premiere Pro**: Video Sorting, Interview Clip Identification
**InDesign & Illustrator**: Project Compliance Checks & Layer Reorganization
scenes.vo: Capabilities vary by app: Photoshop streamlines layer management and background removal, Premiere Pro sorts and identifies key video clips, and InDesign ensures project compliance automatically.
'Guide You Down the Happy Path' - Adobe's philosophy behind its AI Agents, designed to assist, not overwhelm, ensuring a seamless creative experience.

scenes.name: Adobe AI Assistants
scenes.vo: Meet Adobe AI Assistants: Your new creative partners in Photoshop, Premiere Pro, InDesign, Illustrator, and Frame.io, available now in public beta.

scenes.title: Adobe AI vs. Competitors
scenes.vo: Adobe's AI stands out from competitors with its deep integration into industry-standard creative tools, offering a unified AI-powered ecosystem.

scenes.headline: **Unlock Efficiency with Adobe's AI**
scenes.cta: Subscribe to The Inference for More Tech Insights
scenes.vo: Unlock Efficiency with Adobe's AI: Empower your creativity, enhance your productivity, and experience the future of content creation today with Adobe's Expanded AI Agents.
